Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie finish building up their jazzed up 305 SBC.
Video.title: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Image.alt: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Video.summary: We bring our 305 Small Block Chevy back for a second round of racier upgrades.
Video.title: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Image.alt: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are building the ultimate kayak vehicle, a Nissan Frontier Pro 4X, in one month.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Video.summary: Under a tight deadline for SEMA, Chris and Eric are scrambling to finish their Nissan Frontier.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Video.summary: We’re at Stovalls collision and wrecking service searching for a 4 wheel drive square body.
Video.title: How To Choose A Square Body

Image.alt: How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body
How To Choose A Square Body

Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: Transforming a junkyard Ford flathead into a classic hot rod V8.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead

Image.alt: Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead
Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead
Old Skool Flatty: Part 1 How to Hot Rod a Ford Flathead

Video.summary: Engine guru Keith Dorton helps build our Ford flathead with 3/4 race cam, high compression heads and 3 deuces.
Video.title: Old Skool Flatty: 3 Deuce V8

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: What started as a simple “aerosol overhaul” gets more complicated!
Video.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

Video.summary: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets an upgraded suspension that can handle the trails.
Video.title: Junk Mail Suspension

Video.summary: We start the reassembly of our '78 Postal Jeep.
Video.title: Mail Jeep Resurrection

Video.summary: The guys make room on Junk Mail for bigger wheels and tires.
Video.title: Junk Mail Body Mods

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets the interior buttoned up adding shifters and seats.
Video.title: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Image.alt: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Video.summary: We bring Project Junk Mail back into the shop to address some trail problems.
Video.title: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Image.alt: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Video.summary: We're putting together a high-compression 440ci road race engine for Carcass' 1972 Camaro race car!
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Video.summary: We finish the assembly of our 440 with a conventional SBC bottom end and LS induction.
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Video.summary: We buy a ’02 Sierra on the cheap and turn it into a reliable, powerful daily driver.
Video.title: GMC Sierra Old School Build

Video.summary: We trash the factory Gov-lock rear for a true posi to get both tires spinning.
Video.title: Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra

Image.alt: Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra
Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra
Adding Posi-traction to our ’02 Old School Sierra

Video.summary: Transformation of our throwback Sierra continues with a lift kit, 33” tall tires, and a tune-up.
Video.title: Leveling Kit ’02 Old School Sierra

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: Mike and Pat modernize a mid 90's themed Pro Street '62 Chevy II Nova.
Video.title: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I

Image.alt: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part I

Video.summary: This Nova is no joke. Its 588 Big Block gets updated with a wicked manifold and EFI.
Video.title: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part II

Image.alt: Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part II
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part II
Pro Street or No Street Nova - Part II

Video.summary: The 62 Nova is ready for final assembly.
Video.title: The Return of Project Pro Street or No-Street Nova

Image.alt: The Return of Project Pro Street or No-Street Nova
The Return of Project Pro Street or No-Street Nova
The Return of Project Pro Street or No-Street Nova

Video.summary: Mike, Pat and several local gearheads eat bbq and go head to head for the first annual BBQ And Burnouts.
Video.title: BBQ & Burnouts

Video.summary: Assembly on the 4.3L engine begins with a solid bottom end.
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 Bottom End Build

Video.summary: The 4.3L engine shows what it can do in the dyno cell!
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 on the Dyno

Video.summary: We crank up the power on our old-school GM 4.3L V6 with some turbocharged forced induction.
Video.title: Turbocharging the GM 4.3L V6

Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: We put custom touches on our 496ci Stroker Big Block and get it ready for the street rod life!
Video.title: 496ci Stroker Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: Team preps survivor '63 Galaxie for 1/2 mile top-speed assault, installing our turbo’d Black & Blue 347.
Video.title: Galaxie Teardown

Video.summary: A '63 Galaxie is rolled into the shop and fitted with the 347 turbo known as "Little Black & Blue."
Video.title: Galaxie Time Capsule

Video.summary: Team continues the transformation of its turbocharged ’63 Galaxie into a top-speed terror.
Video.title: Battlestar Galaxie

Video.summary: Team installs 200-mph capable suspension on its 1,000-hp '63 Galaxie
Video.title: Half-Mile Hauler
